result.status_detail: poe re-check (vs #558): SAME RESULT — ws_fallback_error template TRIGGERS (user prompt rendered in red/pink failure-bubble + 메시지 전송에 실패했습니다 + retry icon) but warning text is generic delivery error, NOT '보안 경고'. APF intercept active at WS layer; text injection not happening (template renders fixed Korean fallback string).
result.test_progression: page_load=OK, login=OK, prompt_send=OK, ws_intercept=OK, fallback_render=OK, expected_text_match=FAIL
result.verdict_diff_from_558: IDENTICAL — no change in behavior; template still renders generic Korean delivery-failed text

notes: Batch F-6 poe re-check. ws_fallback_error template is working as designed — it intercepts and shows fallback UI. But test spec expects literal '보안 경고' in rendered text, which the template does not output (it shows generic delivery failure in user's locale). This is a TEST SPEC vs TEMPLATE DESIGN mismatch — to PASS this assertion, the ws_fallback_error template would need to inject '보안 경고' string. Until then, poe will FAIL this expected_text check while functionally blocking the prompt.
